summary: Iteration 37 - Phase 1 Features Testing: Activity Log System, AI Workflow Builder, Email Service. All features working correctly. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Activity Log page (/admin/activity) correctly displays stats cards: Total Activities (958), Entity Types (9), Actions (29), Active Users (10)
Activity Log Live Feed view shows activity entries with user name, role badge, action, entity type, timestamp
Activity Log By User view shows most active users with click-to-view functionality
Activity Log By Type view shows activity counts by entity type (document: 56, user: 735, sale: 91, case: 44, etc.)
Activity Log filters work: Last 24 hours, 7 days, 30 days, 90 days + entity type filter
AI Workflow Builder page (/admin/ai-workflow) shows 10 quick templates as expected
AI Workflow Builder templates: Canada PR, Australia PR, Canada/Australia/UK/NZ/USA/Singapore/UAE Tourist Visas, UAE Golden Visa
AI Workflow Builder custom selection with Country dropdown and Service Type input works
AI Workflow Builder clicking template navigates to configure step with pre-filled values
AI Workflow Builder Generate Workflow with AI button present and functional (tested via API)
Admin Dashboard Tools group contains: Analytics, Activity Log, AI Workflow Builder, Workflows, Marketing
Email Service falls back to mock logging when RESEND_API_KEY not configured (expected behavior)
All 4 dashboard roles work: Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client (no regressions)
Case Manager Info Sheets tab (P0) shows 8 case cards - regression test passed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 tested Phase 1 features. ALL PASSED: (1) Activity Log - stats cards, live feed, by user, by type views, filters all work, (2) AI Workflow Builder - 10 templates, custom selection, configure step, generate workflow API all work, (3) Email Service - mock fallback working as expected (no RESEND_API_KEY), (4) All 4 dashboard roles work with no regressions, (5) Case Manager Info Sheets P0 feature still works (8 case cards displayed).

activity_log.stats_cards: PASS - Total Activities, Entity Types, Actions, Active Users
activity_log.live_feed_view: PASS - Shows activity entries with user info, action, timestamp
activity_log.by_type_view: PASS - Shows activity counts by entity type
activity_log.entity_type_filter: PASS - All Types, Sales, Cases, Documents, etc.

email_service.mock_fallback: PASS - Falls back to mock when no RESEND_API_KEY

dashboard_roles.admin: PASS - Dashboard loads, sidebar navigation works
dashboard_roles.case_manager: PASS - Dashboard loads, Info Sheets tab works
dashboard_roles.partner: PASS - Dashboard loads, My Sales/Commission/Support tabs work
dashboard_roles.client: PASS - Dashboard loads, Overview/Documents/Payments tabs work

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - Resend API falls back to in-app mock logging (no RESEND_API_KEY configured)
